description: Select either or both of the most variable genes and then find the principal components using PCA. These will then be available for the downstram trajectory analysis.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.FeatureSelection GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.FeatureSelection is a GenePattern module that Select either or both of the most variable genes and then find the principal components using PCA. These will then be available for the downstram trajectory analysis.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 14 parameters:
- Required: data.file
- Optional: loess.fraction, percentile, num.genes, output.filename, feature, find.variable.genes, find.principal.components, num.principal.components, max.principal.components, first.principal.component, use.precomputed, figure.height, figure.width

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/featureselection_command_line.py -m <data.file> <output.filename> <loess.fraction> <percentile> <num.genes> -n_j <job.cpuCount> <feature> <num.principal.components> <max.principal.components> --flag <first.principal.component> --flag  <use.precomputed> --flag <find.variable.genes> --flag <find.principal.components> <figure.height> <figure.width>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_featureselection\:0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing an annotated AnnData matrix of gene expression data

parameters.name: loess.fraction
parameters.description: Between 0 and 1. The fraction of the data used when estimating each y-value in LOWESS function.

parameters.name: percentile
parameters.description: Between 0 and 100. Specify the percentile to select genes.Genes are ordered based on its distance from the fitted curve.

parameters.name: num.genes
parameters.description: Specify the number of selected genes. Genes are ordered based on its distance from the fitted curve.

parameters.name: feature
parameters.description: Choose from the genes in the dataset, Features used for pricipal component analysis.  If None, all the genes will be used.  IF 'var_genes', the most variable genes obtained from select_variable_genes() will be used.

parameters.name: num.principal.components
parameters.description: The number of selected principal components.

parameters.name: max.principal.components
parameters.description: The maximum number of principal components used for variance Ratio plot.

parameters.name: first.principal.component
parameters.description: If True, the first principal component will be included.

parameters.name: use.precomputed
parameters.description: If True, the PCA results from previous computing will be used.
